---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/mrs.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/MSchmidtStrah
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/monikastrah
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/monika-strah-500530/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:mail.monika.strah@case.edu"  
---

::: {#about-block}
:::

# Welcome to my website!

On this website, you will find a selection of my published works. You will also find news and updates on my current research projects. I invite you to explore my website and please feel free to [contact me](mailto:mail.monika.strah@case.edu) if you have any questions or would like to discuss potential projects.

```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://www.marvinschmitt.com/blog/website-tutorial-quarto/" role="button" target="_blank" style="padding: 15px 30px;">View the tutorial for this template (+ download link)</a>
</div>
```
